name: Accordion
summary: Composable disclosure primitives for progressive reveal content.

name: Alert
summary: Contextual feedback blocks for status, caution, and system messaging.

name: Avatar
summary: Identity visuals with image, fallback, badge, and grouping patterns.

name: Badge
summary: Small metadata labels for state, tags, and secondary status.

name: Button
summary: Action primitives with variants, loading, icon support, and sizing options.

name: Button Group
summary: Grouped actions with shared borders and compact horizontal layouts.

name: Breadcrumb
summary: Semantic navigation trails with links, current page, separators, ellipsis, and RTL support.

name: Calendar
summary: Date and range selection with dropdown captions, week numbers, disabled dates, timezone formatting, and RTL support.

name: Card
summary: Composable content surfaces with header, content, footer, actions, media, sizing, and spacing tokens.

name: Carousel
summary: Composable scroll-snap carousel primitives with sizing, spacing, orientation, API, plugins, and RTL support.

name: Checkbox
summary: Native form-compatible boolean input with token-based styling.

name: Collapsible
summary: Single-panel disclosure primitive for toggling additional content.

name: Command
summary: Searchable command menus and command palettes for quick actions.

name: Combobox
summary: Searchable single and multi-value selection with composable slots.

name: Context Menu
summary: Right-click and long-press menus with actions, groups, submenus, shortcuts, checkbox and radio items.

name: Confirm Modal
summary: Typed confirmation dialog built on modal primitives with configurable title, description, and action labels.

name: Confirm Popover
summary: Anchored confirmation prompt that can attach to buttons, cards, rows, and custom trigger components.

name: Date Picker
summary: Calendar-backed date and range picker with presets, editable input, time selection, RTL, and reactive forms support.

name: Drag Drop
summary: CDK-backed drag and drop primitives for sortable lists, connected lists, and swimlane boards.

name: Dropdown Menu
summary: Menus with hover and click triggers, submenus, and keyboard support.

name: Empty
summary: Composable empty states with media, title, description, actions, inputs, avatars, and RTL support.

name: Hover Card
summary: Delayed hover previews for links and actions with configurable timing, positioning, styling, and RTL support.

name: Field
summary: Layout composition primitives for labels, descriptions, and errors.

name: Input
summary: Native text input primitives with labeling and feedback patterns.

name: Input OTP
summary: One-time password input with grouped slots, separators, paste support, patterns, and reactive forms compatibility.

name: Item
summary: Composable row primitive with media, content, descriptions, actions, grouping, links, sizing, and RTL support.

name: Menubar
summary: Persistent application menu built on dropdown-menu primitives with groups, checkbox and radio items, submenus, shortcuts, icons, and RTL support.

name: Navigation Menu
summary: Website navigation primitive with dropdown-backed panels, rich links, indicators, viewport styling, direct links, and RTL support.

name: Pagination
summary: Page navigation primitives with previous, next, active links, ellipsis, disabled states, dropdown pairing, and RTL support.

name: Popover
summary: Anchored overlay content with trigger, close controls, alignment, controlled state, forms, custom styling, and RTL support.

name: Progress
summary: Accessible progress indicators with determinate, indeterminate, labeled, controlled, custom styling, and RTL patterns.

name: Radio Group
summary: Native radio group primitives with descriptions, choice cards, fieldset grouping, reactive forms validation, custom styling, and RTL support.

name: Resizable
summary: Accessible resizable panel groups with horizontal and vertical layouts, handles, nested groups, constraints, keyboard resizing, and RTL support.

name: Separator
summary: Visual and semantic dividers with horizontal, vertical, decorative, custom styling, and RTL support.

name: Sheet
summary: Edge-mounted dialog panels with sides, headers, descriptions, footers, scrollable content, programmatic opening, and RTL support.

name: Sidebar
summary: Composable application sidebars with provider state, variants, collapsible modes, menu primitives, rail, trigger, skeletons, and RTL support.

name: Skeleton
summary: Composable loading placeholders with sizing inputs, shimmer animation, token styling, and RTL-friendly layouts.

name: Spinner
summary: Portable loading indicator primitive with accessible status, decorative mode, size presets, token styling, and composition examples.

name: Slider
summary: Range input primitive with single, range, multiple thumb, vertical, controlled, RTL, and reactive forms support.

name: Modal
summary: Dialog primitives powered by Angular CDK with trigger, close, layout, and programmatic opening support.

name: Select
summary: Button-triggered listbox selection built with composable primitives.

name: Switch
summary: Native checkbox-based toggle control for boolean settings.

name: Table
summary: CDK-backed table primitives with captions, headers, rows, footers, sticky columns, empty states, actions, and virtual scrolling support.

name: Tabs
summary: Composable tab panels with list, trigger, content, variants, icons, vertical layout, RTL, and router-link support.

name: Textarea
summary: Native multi-line text input with invalid, disabled, RTL, and Field composition support.

name: Toggle
summary: Two-state button primitive with pressed state, variants, sizing, icons, labels, and reactive forms support.

name: Tooltip
summary: Hover and focus hints with side, alignment, delay, keyboard dismissal, arrow variants, and RTL support.

name: Toast
summary: Stackable notifications with variants, actions, loading states, dismissal controls, positions, and RTL support.

name: Virtual Scroll
summary: Reusable fixed-row virtualization primitives for large data sets.
